title: agropyron pubiflorum
intro: Agropyron pubiflorum, also known as False Wheat Grass or False Wheat, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Agropyron pubiflorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Agropyron pubiflorum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots can be dried and used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
